title: More Nonsense Limerick 88
content:
There was an old man of Boulak,
    Who sate on a Crocodile's back;
    But they said, "Towr'ds the night 
    He may probably bite,
    Which might vex you, old man of Boulak!"
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "More Nonsense Limerick 88", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
